title: Elbaf’s Past Turns Violent
description: On pages 0–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Figarland Garling as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The island became an inescapable flashpoint...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: God Valley, what happens when legends meet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there was a prize I really wanted!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will take responsibility and get it for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: responsibility?! You'll be taking responsibility for all this, you idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's use this chaos to hop on a boat and slip away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hang in there just a bit longer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, I see 'em! A marine with a little bundle in his arms!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who would've thought a prick like garlic could have a kid...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's almost as strange as our intriguing little kidnapper...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait! Those babies... they're my only chance to stone for helping; set up this twisted murder game!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was nice knowing you, young man! (>)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess that's that... considering all the dead, this is probably what I deserve...

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
